items.title: VBWD Hotel — Self-hosted property platform
items.content_html:
VBWD Hotel

🏨 Run your property on one self-hosted stack

Bookings, rooms, guest chat and billing — one codebase, no per-seat SaaS tax. Self-host it yourself, free.

cmsmainchattheme-switcherstripepaypalmollieanalytics
Why VBWD Hotel

One platform, every guest touchpoint

VBWD core is intentionally agnostic — every hotel-specific behaviour is a plugin you can switch on or off. No vendor lock-in, no restart, no surprises.

7Plugins enabled
23Payment rails
1,851+Passing tests
65+REST endpoints
Explore

Take the tour

About this instance →

What VBWD Hotel demonstrates and the plugin constellation behind it.

Features →

Every enabled plugin, what’s on the roadmap, and the core you inherit.

Integrations →

The third-party systems a property typically connects at the edges.

Payment modules →

All 23 payment rails — 3 implemented today, 20 on the roadmap.

Become a partner →

Resell and implement VBWD Hotel for your clients at 20–30% commission.

Self-hosted · BSL 1.1

Host it for yourself free; production use needs a licence.

Free with core

Guarantees you inherit

  • Subscription lifecycle — PENDING → ACTIVE → CANCELLED → EXPIRED.
  • Multi-currency pricing, regional tax, line-item invoicing.
  • Pre-arrival guest chat — multilingual, KB-aware, hand-off to reception.
  • JWT auth with access + refresh, bcrypt hashing, RBAC.
  • Outbound webhooks with retry and delivery logs.
  • Enable / disable plugins without a server restart.

Ready to see it for your property? Get in touch →
items.meta_description: Bookings, rooms, guest chat and billing on one self-hosted stack. VBWD Hotel is a worked example of the agnostic VBWD core driven entirely by plugins.
items.meta_keywords: vbwd, hotel, self-hosted saas, booking, property management, open source
items.og_description: One codebase for bookings, rooms, guest chat and billing. Self-host it free.
